mode.title: Mode
mode.description: What kind of URL to check: product item pages or seller/store pages.

startUrls.title: AliExpress URLs
startUrls.description: List of AliExpress URLs to check. For product mode use item pages (e.g. https://vi.aliexpress.com/item/1005004771213104.html); for seller mode use store pages (e.g. https://www.aliexpress.com/store/1101692994). Each URL is checked independently.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings. RESIDENTIAL Apify Proxy is strongly recommended — AliExpress aggressively blocks datacenter IPs and may serve an anti-bot page that looks like an unavailable product. Requires being logged in (apify login) locally and a plan that includes residential proxy.

maxConcurrency.title: Max concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: Maximum number of product URLs checked in parallel. Keep low (3-5) to avoid triggering AliExpress anti-bot.

sameDomainDelaySecs.title: Delay between requests (seconds)
sameDomainDelaySecs.description: Minimum delay between consecutive requests to AliExpress. Increasing this (e.g. 2-5) reduces blocking, especially without a residential proxy.

maxRequestRetries.title: Max request retries
maxRequestRetries.description: How many times to retry a URL (with a fresh session/proxy) when it appears blocked, before recording it as an error.
